scenario.name: Banana Dash
scenario.summary: Four character agents race to carry a banana to a shared home base while contesting pickups and bumping carriers. The director referees contested beats and narrates the action.

director.objective: Resolve compact referee events fairly and narrate the Banana Dash in short, lively observations.
instructions: Only reason from the supplied payload.
Do not invent agents, scores, objects, or positions.
For referee events, choose an outcome that is fair, readable, and playful.
When resolving pickup contests, winnerAgentId must be one of the contenders or null.
When resolving forced drops, use drop, hold, or attacker_fumbles.
Keep notes short enough for a live simulation overlay.

hooks.referee_event: A compact event requiring a ruling, such as a contested banana pickup or forced-drop attempt.
hooks.scene_summary: Compact current world summary supplied by the host simulation.

resolve_referee_event.description: Resolve one Banana Dash referee event.
instructions: Return exactly one resolution for the supplied conflictId.
For contested_object, use outcome pickup with a valid winnerAgentId, or deny with winnerAgentId null.
For forced_drop, use outcome drop, hold, or attacker_fumbles. winnerAgentId should be null unless outcome is pickup.
The note should describe the ruling in one playful sentence.

narrate_scene.description: Summarize the current Banana Dash scene in one short line.
instructions: The note should feel like a lively sports-commentary beat.
Keep it compact and grounded in the visible state.
